notes: People-search / data broker site. WHOIS failed due to registrar_url being returned as a list — fixed in v0.2.2. Metadata returned HTTP 403 (bot-blocking), which caused all trust signals to appear missing. In v0.2.2 the missing_all_trust_signals signal only fires on HTTP 200 responses to avoid false positives from bot-blocking. Certificate has 89 days to expiry (no expiring_soon signal). Post-calibration expected: ~5-10 pts (LOW) due to limited content data from 403 block.

raw_evidence.whois_error: ValidationError: registrar_url returned as list ['http://www.enomdomains.com', ...] — fixed in v0.2.2
